'''kolabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twatlike|twatlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twatlike|twatlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kolabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kolabithi|kolabithi]] || [[word:kolabiji|kolabiji]] || [[word:kolabishi|kolabishi]] || [[word:kolabiki|kolabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kolabuthuthu|kolabuthuthu]] || [[word:kolabujuju|kolabujuju]] || [[word:kolabushushu|kolabushushu]] || [[word:kolabukuku|kolabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kolabuthu|kolabuthu]] || [[word:kolabuju|kolabuju]] || [[word:kolabushu|kolabushu]] || [[word:kolabuku|kolabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kolabufthuf|kolabufthuf]] || [[word:kolabufjuf|kolabufjuf]] || [[word:kolabufshuf|kolabufshuf]] || [[word:kolabufkuf|kolabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kolabethe|kolabethe]] || [[word:kolabeje|kolabeje]] || [[word:kolabeshe|kolabeshe]] || [[word:kolabeke|kolabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kolabothotho|kolabothotho]] || [[word:kolabojojo|kolabojojo]] || [[word:kolaboshosho|kolaboshosho]] || [[word:kolabokoko|kolabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kolabotho|kolabotho]] || [[word:kolabojo|kolabojo]] || [[word:kolabosho|kolabosho]] || [[word:kolaboko|kolaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kolabofthof|kolabofthof]] || [[word:kolabofjof|kolabofjof]] || [[word:kolabofshof|kolabofshof]] || [[word:kolabofkof|kolabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfthÃŸf|kolabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfjÃŸf|kolabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfshÃŸf|kolabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfkÃŸf|kolabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kolabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kolabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kolabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kolabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfthÃŸf|kolabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfjÃŸf|kolabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfshÃŸf|kolabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfkÃŸf|kolabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfthÃŸf|kolabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfjÃŸf|kolabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfshÃŸf|kolabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kolabÃŸfkÃŸf|kolabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kolabÃḊthÃḊ|kolabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kolabÃḊjÃḊ|kolabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kolabÃḊshÃḊ|kolabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kolabÃḊkÃḊ|kolabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kolabathatha|kolabathatha]] || [[word:kolabajaja|kolabajaja]] || [[word:kolabashasha|kolabashasha]] || [[word:kolabakaka|kolabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kolabatha|kolabatha]] || [[word:kolabaja|kolabaja]] || [[word:kolabasha|kolabasha]] || [[word:kolabaka|kolabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kolabafthaf|kolabafthaf]] || [[word:kolabafjaf|kolabafjaf]] || [[word:kolabafshaf|kolabafshaf]] || [[word:kolabafkaf|kolabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kolabasha|kolabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kolabshÃḋsha|kolabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kolabrosha|kolabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kolabmusha|kolabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kolabyasha|kolabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokolabnkshÃḋsha|gokolabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokolabnkrosha|gokolabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokolabnkmusha|gokolabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokolabnkyasha|gokolabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kolalabasha|kolalabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kolalabshÃḋsha|kolalabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kolalabrosha|kolalabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kolalabmusha|kolalabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kolalabyasha|kolalabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokolalabnkshÃḋsha|gokolalabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokolalabnkrosha|gokolalabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokolalabnkmusha|gokolalabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokolalabnkyasha|gokolalabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kelÃḊbasha|kelÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kelÃḊbshÃḋsha|kelÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kelÃḊbrosha|kelÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kelÃḊbmusha|kelÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kelÃḊbyasha|kelÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokelÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gokelÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokelÃḊbnkrosha|gokelÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokelÃḊbnkmusha|gokelÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokelÃḊbnkyasha|gokelÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kolfabasha|kolfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kolfabshÃḋsha|kolfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kolfabrosha|kolfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kolfabmusha|kolfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kolfabyasha|kolfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokolfabnkshÃḋsha|gokolfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokolfabnkrosha|gokolfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokolfabnkmusha|gokolfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokolfabnkyasha|gokolfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
